rationale: Bug hunt on C8 files revealed C8 code fixes were NEVER PUSHED (only status JSONs were committed). BUG-024 HIGH: minigame.start() missing causes minigame hang. BUG-025 MEDIUM: set_color_levels ignores render mode. Both fixed. Feature: encounter card overlay rewritten with CRT_PALETTE styling, MerlinVisual helpers, per-choice lexical field hint labels with color-coded accents, staggered button animation.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on cycle 9 code (encounter_card_overlay CRT rewrite). Then: Ogham/Rune activation UI during card encounters — row of owned runes above choices, tap to activate before selecting.
